scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.format: npm run format -w backend && npm run format -w frontend
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check -w backend && npm run format:check -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
